items.raw_desc: LTE antenna Poynting XPOL-2-5G:        Directional antenna Poynting XPOL-2-5G with cross-polarization is the optimal solution for 4G/5G reception and backward compatible with LTE/2G/3G in areas with weak signal. Two integrated 2 MIMO antennas with opposite polarization support diversity of reception and thus ensure a quality signal. Compared to the previous generation, this antenna has a redesigned inner part for even higher efficiency. In addition to the new bands, the gain at 1700 MHz and 2.7 GHz is approximately 3 dB higher than the previous generation. Antenna Poynting XPOL-2-5G  is supplied with double low-loss cable HDF-195 of 5 m length terminated with 2× SMA-m connector. The SMA connector used is commonly used in a wide range of routers. To maximize signal quality and minimize potential transients, the antenna does not use connectors and the cable is connected directly. A tapadásmentes felülettel nem kell aggódnod, hogy odaég az étel, és nem kell sok időt fordítanod a fritőz tisztítására sem. Attól függően, hogy épp milyen ínyencség sül, 40 és 200 °C között módosítható a fritőz hőfoka.
